krokve._note: KR INSERT count is gross (incl sloupky + námětky); geometric calc primary per items.json

podlahy._note: Comparing dum habitable (vinyl + dlažba) vs TZ 219.3. Biodeska 25 m² is půdní spící patro nad krovem — ADDITIONAL surface, NOT in TZ habitable.

fasada_etics._logic: priprava ≈ EPS ≈ omítka should match within ±5 %

steny_vnitrni._logic: Paint-able = interiérová omítka stěn + SDK podhled stropy. Výmalba pokrývá paintable - obklady. Δ ≤ 10 % acceptable (round 70-cm obklad sub).

section_I_cost_ratio._method: Σ(qty × Methvin průměrná sazba) per kapitola → aggregate per gate
section_I_cost_ratio._disclaimer: Methvin rates have INCONSISTENT UNITS per kapitola (Kč/m³ vs Kč/m² vs Kč/ks) and are aggregated naively — results are NOT reliable for ratio analysis. Treated as informational ballpark only. Real cenotvorba requires unit-aware per-item rates from URS catalog. Verdict 'OUT OF RANGE' for this section is EXPECTED and not treated as a gap in consolidated_gaps.
